query:
SELECT t.id AS token_id, u.id, u.email, u.name,
                                  u.role AS "role: UserRole",
                                  u.status AS "status: UserStatus"
                           FROM api_tokens t
                           JOIN users u ON u.id = t.user_id
                           WHERE t.token_hash = $1
                             AND (t.expires_at IS NULL OR t.expires_at > now())
